summary: MEGA PROMPT #28: Market Launch & First Customers - Complete testing of all 12 market launch endpoints and frontend UI. All 15 backend tests PASS (100%). Frontend Market Launch page renders correctly with 5 tabs and all interactive elements working.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/market-launch/pilot-agencies - Returns agencies list with summary stats (total, active, onboarding, with_bookings, with_feedback, adoption_rate_pct)
POST /api/market-launch/pilot-agencies/onboard - Onboards new agency with company_name, contact_name, contact_email, contact_phone, pricing_tier (default: free)
PUT /api/market-launch/pilot-agencies/update - Updates agency status/metrics (status, supplier_credentials_status, etc.)
GET /api/market-launch/usage-metrics?days=N - Returns searches, bookings, commissions, conversion_rate_pct, revenue, margin, daily breakdown
POST /api/market-launch/feedback - Submits agency feedback with ratings (1-5) for 6 categories
GET /api/market-launch/feedback - Returns feedback summary with averages, overall_score, feedbacks list, questions
GET /api/market-launch/pricing - Returns 4 SaaS pricing tiers (Free/Starter/Pro/Enterprise) with correct pricing (0/49/149/custom EUR)
GET /api/market-launch/launch-kpis - Returns comprehensive KPI dashboard (active_agencies, total_searches_30d, booking_conversion_pct, etc.)
GET /api/market-launch/launch-report - Full report with market_readiness_score (overall + 7 dimensions), pilot_summary, usage_metrics, positioning
GET /api/market-launch/support - Returns 4 support channels (email, whatsapp, documentation, faq) with response_sla
GET /api/market-launch/positioning - Returns market positioning statement with tagline, headline, value_props, differentiators
All endpoints properly require admin/super_admin roles (401/403 for unauthenticated requests)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All 5 tabs render, forms work, star ratings work)

seed_data_creation: Test created: TEST_MARKET_LAUNCH_AGENCY (pilot agency), TEST_FEEDBACK_AGENCY (feedback entry)
context_for_next_testing_agent: MEGA PROMPT #28 Market Launch & First Customers fully tested. Key features: 1) Market Launch page at /app/admin/market-launch with 5 tabs: Pilot Acenteler, Kullanim, Feedback, Fiyatlandirma, Launch Raporu, 2) Pilot agencies: 4 agencies shown (Mavi Tur=active, Star Travel=onboarding, Golden Gate Tourism=onboarding, TEST_MARKET_LAUNCH_AGENCY=active), 3) Pricing tiers: Free (0EUR, 3%), Starter (49EUR, 2%), Pro (149EUR, 1% - 'Populer' badge), Enterprise (custom), 4) Feedback: 2 responses, overall score 4.25/5, star ratings for 6 categories, 5) Usage metrics: 12 searches shown with daily chart, 6) Launch report: Market Readiness Score 4.93/10 with 7 dimension scores, 5 operational risks, positioning statement, 7) Agency onboard form: company_name, contact_name, contact_email, contact_phone, pricing_tier (default free), 8) Feedback form: agency name input + 6 star rating questions + comments + Gonder button.

backend_apis.POST /api/market-launch/pilot-agencies/o: PASS - Creates new agency with onboarding status
backend_apis.PUT /api/market-launch/pilot-agencies/up: PASS - Updates agency status to active
backend_apis.GET /api/market-launch/usage-metrics: PASS - Returns 7/14/30 day metrics with daily breakdown
backend_apis.POST /api/market-launch/feedback: PASS - Submits feedback with 6 category ratings
backend_apis.GET /api/market-launch/feedback: PASS - Returns summary with averages and overall_score
backend_apis.GET /api/market-launch/support: PASS - Returns 4 support channels with SLA
backend_apis.GET /api/market-launch/positioning: PASS - Returns positioning with tagline and value_props

market_launch_ui.tabs: PASS - 5 tabs: Pilot Acenteler, Kullanim, Feedback, Fiyatlandirma, Launch Raporu
market_launch_ui.pilot_agencies_tab: PASS - Shows KPI cards (Toplam Acente=4, Aktif=2, Onboarding=2, Rez. Yapan=1, Adoption=50%)
market_launch_ui.pilot_agencies_table: PASS - Shows 4 agencies with status badges (active/onboarding, configured/pending)
market_launch_ui.agency_onboard_form: PASS - Form with company, contact, email, phone inputs + Onboard button
market_launch_ui.usage_metrics_tab: PASS - Shows 6 KPI cards + daily chart with period selector (7/14/30 Gun)
market_launch_ui.feedback_tab: PASS - Shows 6 category averages with star displays, overall score 4.25/5
market_launch_ui.feedback_form: PASS - Star rating buttons for 6 categories + comments + Gonder button
market_launch_ui.pricing_tab: PASS - Shows 4 pricing cards (Free/Starter/Pro/Enterprise) with features
market_launch_ui.launch_report_tab: PASS - Market Readiness Score 4.93/10 with dimension gauges, risks, positioning

authorization.all_endpoints_protected: PASS - All market launch endpoints return 401/403 without auth

mocked_note: Supplier adapters use mock/test credentials. Market Launch is fully functional with real MongoDB persistence for pilot agencies, feedback, and usage metrics.
